prompts_meta.description: Baseline – describe what you see, no concept hint
Name the concept, ask for a one-sentence connection
Fill-in-the-blank – forces 'shows X because Y' structure (current prompt)
Frame the VLM as an educator explaining to a student
Pass the translated question directly to the model
Ask 'why does this image represent X?' + request visual evidence
Focus on visible connections and interdependencies
Ask the model to tell a brief story about the image
Contrast: what IS shown vs. what would change if the concept were absent
